===Pokémon Evolutions=== [[File:Barry Evolutions.png|thumb|250px|Barry in [[Pokémon Evolutions]]]] Barry appeared in ''[[PE05|The Rival]]''. As he prepared to battle his father [[Palmer]] at the {{si|Battle Tower}}, he thought back to key moments in his journey: choosing {{p|Piplup}} as his [[first partner Pokémon]] at [[Lake Verity]] alongside {{ga|Lucas}}, defeating [[Roark]] to earn his first [[Badge|Gym Badge]], losing a battle against [[Jupiter]] at [[Lake Acuity]], and getting revenge against her at the [[Spear Pillar]]. Eventually, he managed to defeat his father after a hard battle. ====Pokémon==== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Barry |pkmn=Empoleon |stage1=Piplup |stage2=Prinplup |type1=Water |type2=Steel |img=Barry {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Piplup|1=Prinplup}} Evolutions.png |cap=Barry's {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Piplup|1=Prinplup}} |img2=Barry Empoleon Evolutions.png |cap2=Barry's Empoleon |hd=yes |epnum=PE05 |epname=The Rival |vajp= |vaen= |desc={{p|Empoleon}} is Barry's main Pokémon and also his [[first partner Pokémon]]. He obtained it as a {{p|Piplup}} at [[Lake Verity]]. Later, it helped him win his first [[Badge|Gym Badge]] by defeating [[Roark's Cranidos]]. After evolving into {{p|Prinplup}}, it battled against [[Jupiter]]'s {{p|Skuntank}}, but lost. After fully evolving, it battled Skuntank again at the [[Spear Pillar]], this time emerging victorious. Later, when Barry challenged [[Palmer]] at the {{si|Battle Tower}}, Empoleon was his final Pokémon. It managed to defeat Palmer's {{p|Rhyperior}}, making Barry the winner. Empoleon's known moves are {{m|Pound}}, {{m|Bubble}}, {{m|Bubble Beam}}, {{m|Metal Claw}}, and {{m|Hydro Pump}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Barry |pkmn=Heracross |type1=Bug |type2=Fighting |gender=male |img=Barry Heracross Evolutions.png |hd=yes |epnum=PE05 |epname=The Rival |vajp= |vaen= |desc={{p|Heracross}} is Barry's second known Pokémon and the first one he was seen using against [[Palmer]] at the {{si|Battle Tower}}, where he was defeated by {{p|Milotic}}. None of Heracross's moves are known.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Barry |pkmn=Staraptor |type1=Normal |type2=Flying |img=Barry Staraptor Evolutions.png |epnum=PE05 |epname=The Rival |vajp= |vaen= |desc={{p|Staraptor}} is Barry's third known Pokémon and the second one he was seen using at the {{si|Battle Tower}}, where it defeated [[Palmer]]'s {{p|Dragonite}} before losing to {{p|Rhyperior}}. Staraptor's only known move is {{m|Aerial Ace}}.}} ====Achievements==== =====Badges===== [[File:Barry Badges Evolutions.png|thumb|220px|Barry's Sinnoh Badges]] This listing is of the [[Badge]]s Barry has obtained in the [[Sinnoh]] [[region]]: * {{Badge|Coal}} * {{Badge|Forest}} * {{Badge|Cobble}} * {{Badge|Fen}} * {{Badge|Relic}} * {{Badge|Mine}} * {{Badge|Icicle}} * {{Badge|Beacon}} =====Other===== * {{si|Battle Tower}} - Winner (''[[PE05|The Rival]]'') ====Artwork==== {| style="margin:auto; text-align:center; {{roundy|20px}} border: 2px solid #{{water color dark}}; background: #{{water color}}; font-size:80%;" |- | style="{{roundy|5px}} border: 2px solid #{{water color dark}}; background: #{{water color light}}" | [[File:Barry and Prinplup.png|250px]] | style="{{roundy|5px}} border: 2px solid #{{water color dark}}; background: #{{water color light}}" | [[File:Pokémon Evolutions poster.png|200px]] | style="{{roundy|5px}} border: 2px solid #{{water color dark}}; background: #{{water color light}}" | [[File:Barry PE poster.png|200px]] |- | Concept art for advertising of
